source_name: The Edge Bali 度假村概覽
reliability_notes: Primary official property page for the estate scale and villa inventory wording.
raw_excerpt_summary: States The Edge 目前在烏魯瓦圖的懸崖上擁有八棟屢獲殊榮的私人別墅。

reliability_notes: Best official umbrella page for how the estate positions its cliff wedding offering.
raw_excerpt_summary: 將 The Edge 描述為位於懸崖頂端、以奢華婚禮聞名的別墅婚禮莊園。

source_name: The Edge 婚禮套餐頁面
reliability_notes: Official large-format package page with a clear top-end guest capacity.
raw_excerpt_summary: States The Edge 婚禮套餐最多可容納 150 位賓客。

reliability_notes: Official package page for one of the most photogenic cliffside formats.
raw_excerpt_summary: 將天空婚禮呈現為面向地平線的懸崖慶祝形式。

reliability_notes: Official mid-size package page with a clear guest cap and stay-oriented framing.
raw_excerpt_summary: 海上婚禮套餐最多可容納 50 位客人，並包含豪華住宿元素。

reliability_notes: Official package page showing the estate can also handle small private celebrations.
raw_excerpt_summary: 呈現一場圍繞情侶及其核心圈子設計的私人別墅慶祝活動。

reliability_notes: Official villa page useful for the stay experience and likely weather fallback spaces.
raw_excerpt_summary: 展示莊園的懸崖頂別墅作為核心住宿層，擁有私人奢華和海景。

reliability_notes: Useful for signature public-space and atmosphere references such as the sky pool.
raw_excerpt_summary: 亮點是位於烏魯瓦圖懸崖上方 162 公尺處的玻璃底空中泳池。

source_name: 我的海外婚禮 The Edge Bali 概覽
reliability_notes: Current instant-quote page giving a public starting price and practical transport baseline.
raw_excerpt_summary: 列出 30 位賓客的基本婚禮套餐價格為 9,000 美元。

source_name: 我的海外婚禮 The Edge 儀式場地
reliability_notes: Useful for a second public pricing checkpoint focused on ceremony-led formats.
raw_excerpt_summary: 顯示 30 位賓客的基本婚禮套餐價格為 9,400 美元。

source_name: 我的海外婚禮 The Edge 接待場地
reliability_notes: Useful for transport baseline and package framing, but official villa inventory should override any older estate counts.
raw_excerpt_summary: 該地產距離機場約 18 公里，並顯示出以公共接待為主導的定價基準。

source_name: Bridestory The Edge 場地列表
reliability_notes: Useful umbrella listing with reviews and public project links.
raw_excerpt_summary: 作為 The Edge 場地項目和評論的主要 Bridestory 入口點。

source_name: Bridestory The Edge - 峇里島項目
reliability_notes: Recent project page useful for checking the estate's look in a newer visual context.
raw_excerpt_summary: 補上一個與 The Edge Bali 相關的較新項目圖集。

reliability_notes: Useful public micro-wedding price anchor with villa-stay inclusions.

source_name: Bridestory 最近和最親愛的懸崖婚禮套餐
reliability_notes: Useful public package page for a 30-guest cliffside format with accommodation included.

source_name: Trip.com 香港 The Edge Bali 飯店頁
reliability_notes: 中文訂房平台頁面，能補看 villa、泳池與懸崖公共空間的真實住宿視角。
raw_excerpt_summary: 適合先看 The Edge 在房型、泳池與懸崖景觀上的實拍效果，再判斷它的超奢華定位是否符合預期。

source_name: 攜程 The Edge Bali 飯店頁
reliability_notes: 中文訂房平台來源，可補充 The Edge 的 villa、海景公共區域與住宿真實感。
raw_excerpt_summary: 可用來交叉比對 The Edge 的客房、懸崖景觀與整體住宿體驗是否足以支撐婚禮包場型決策。

source_name: Bali For Two Elijah & Morgan 在 The Edge 的真實婚禮
reliability_notes: Real-wedding planner feature; very useful for understanding guest scale at The Edge.
raw_excerpt_summary: 真實婚禮案例，直接看懸崖邊大型賓客規模、進場動線與夜間派對氛圍。

reliability_notes: 印尼婚禮媒合平台，提供場地套餐報價與真實新人評論。評論以印尼語為主。
raw_excerpt_summary: 套餐：Standing Reception: 10 to 150 pax（35人起，IDR 2,718,000/人）；Standing Reception: 50 to 250 pax（200人起，IDR 2,718,000/人）；Real Wedding 案例：Kelsey & Aneesh、Venus & Reuben、Renee & Liegh、Rooms & Facilities
